item.title: Enjoy news ticker plugin by Nuevodevel.com!
item.description: Display news at the bottom or top of the player.

item.title: Import news from the RSS channel
item.description: News is imported from an RSS document.

item.title: Update RSS and refresh news.
item.description: Edit RSS news at any time and display fresh news automatically.

item.title: Display news logo and local time.
item.description: Display news logo (bottom ticker) icon and local time.

item.title: Display news as links.
item.description: Turn one or more news texts into clickable links.

item.title: Order Nuevo plugins now!
item.description: Order Gold set of Nuevo plugins including ticker plugin!
